hero.title: Report an Environmental Issue
hero.subtitle: Help keep your community clean by reporting pollution, illegal dumping, smoke emissions, wastewater discharge, or other environmental hazards. Your report will be verified using AI and forwarded to the appropriate municipal authority.

reports.title: Recent Reports
reports.emptyDesc: Report your first environmental issue to help improve local community standards.

hotspots.title: Nearby Hotspots
hotspots.emptyDesc: No hotspots identified in your immediate vicinity.

theme.title: Theme Preference
theme.desc: Select how the CleaniSense interface appears on your device.
